events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: George Michael, the iconic British singer-songwriter, would have celebrated his 63rd birthday on this day.

angles.name: George Michael's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His music continues to uplift and inspire.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: The music world remembers Michael Jackson, who passed away on this day in 2009 at the age of 50.

angles.name: King of Pop Tribute
angles.copy: 17 years since we lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His unparalleled artistry and groundbreaking music live on.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Peace and Love to Ringo Starr as he turns 86! From the Fab Four to his All-Starr Band, a true rock icon.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Brian May! His Red Special and iconic riffs have shaped rock history.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV changed music forever... starting with a rather ironic first video. The revolution was televised!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', on this day in 1994 in the UK.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 22 years of 'Definitely Maybe'! Oasis's debut album still sounds as anthemic today as it did back in '94.

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began on this day in 1969, featuring iconic performances over three days.

angles.name: 3 Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: Remembering the start of Woodstock '69. A generation-defining moment of peace, love, and incredible music. What was your favourite performance?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: The world remembers Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977 at the age of 42.

angles.name: King of Rock and Roll Tribute
angles.copy: 49 years since the passing of the one and only King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley. His legacy is eternal.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: The music world remembers Tupac Shakur, who passed away on this day in 1996 at the age of 25.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the lyrical genius of Tupac Shakur, who left us far too soon on this day in '96. His words still resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: The music world remembers guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970 at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar God Tribute
angles.copy: 56 years since we lost the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in 1969 in the UK.

angles.name: Iconic Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years of 'Abbey Road'! The Beatles' timeless masterpiece and that legendary zebra crossing cover still captivate.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the inimitable Chrissie Hynde! Still delivering those classic Pretenders hits with unmatched style.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for it Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released in UK (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Timeless Message
angles.copy: 49 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released in the UK. Its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly as ever.

events.title: Apple launched the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: A Thousand Songs in Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing how we listen to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day marks the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007's enduring legacy, from iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs. What's your favourite Bond film?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder, John Lennon, would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. Imagine all the music still to come.
